<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8">
  <title>The DIY Wedding Flower Planner — Bloom Culture</title>
  <style>
    * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
    body { background: #faf9f5; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 100vh; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; }
    #__bundler_loading { position: fixed; bottom: 20px; right: 20px; font: 13px/1.4 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; color: #666; background: #fff; padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); z-index: 10000; }
    #__bundler_thumbnail { position: fixed; inset: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #faf9f5; z-index: 9999; }
    #__bundler_thumbnail svg { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; }
    #__bundler_placeholder { color: #999; font-size: 14px; }
  </style>
  <noscript>
    <style>#__bundler_loading { display: none; }</style>
    <div style="position:fixed;bottom:12px;left:12px;font:13px/1.4 -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,sans-serif;color:#999;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.9);padding:6px 12px;border-radius:6px;box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);z-index:10000;">

  <script>
    
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', async function() {
  const loading = document.getElementById('__bundler_loading');
  function setStatus(msg) { if (loading) loading.textContent = msg; }

  // Error sink persists across replaceWith since it's on window, not the DOM.
  window.addEventListener('error', function(e) {
    var p = document.body || document.documentElement;
    var d = document.getElementById('__bundler_err') || p.appendChild(document.createElement('div'));
    d.id = '__bundler_err';
    d.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;bottom:12px;left:12px;right:12px;font:12px/1.4 ui-monospace,monospace;background:#2a1215;color:#ff8a80;padding:10px 14px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #5c2b2e;z-index:99999;white-space:pre-wrap;max-height:40vh;overflow:auto';
    d.textContent = (d.textContent ? d.textContent + String.fromCharCode(10) : '') +
      '[bundle] ' + (e.message || e.type) +
      (e.filename ? ' (' + e.filename.slice(0, 60) + ':' + e.lineno + ')' : '');
  }, true);

  try {
    const manifestEl = document.querySelector('script[type="__bundler/manifest"]');
    const templateEl = document.querySelector('script[type="__bundler/template"]');
    if (!manifestEl || !templateEl) {
      setStatus('Error: missing bundle data');
      console.error('[bundler] Missing script tags — manifestEl:', !!manifestEl, 'templateEl:', !!templateEl);
      return;
    }

    const manifest = JSON.parse(manifestEl.textContent);
    let template = JSON.parse(templateEl.textContent);

    const uuids = Object.keys(manifest);
    setStatus('Unpacking ' + uuids.length + ' assets...');

    const blobUrls = {};
    await Promise.all(uuids.map(async (uuid) => {
      const entry = manifest[uuid];
      try {
        const binaryStr = atob(entry.data);
        const bytes = new Uint8Array(binaryStr.length);
        for (let i = 0; i < binaryStr.length; i++) bytes[i] = binaryStr.charCodeAt(i);

        let finalBytes = bytes;
        if (entry.compressed) {
          if (typeof DecompressionStream !== 'undefined') {
            const ds = new DecompressionStream('gzip');
            const writer = ds.writable.getWriter();
            const reader = ds.readable.getReader();
            writer.write(bytes);
            writer.close();
            const chunks = [];
            let totalLen = 0;
            while (true) {
              const { done, value } = await reader.read();
              if (done) break;
              chunks.push(value);
              totalLen += value.length;
            }
            finalBytes = new Uint8Array(totalLen);
            let offset = 0;
            for (const chunk of chunks) { finalBytes.set(chunk, offset); offset += chunk.length; }
          } else {
            console.warn('DecompressionStream not available, asset ' + uuid + ' may not render');
          }
        }

        blobUrls[uuid] = URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([finalBytes], { type: entry.mime }));
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('Failed to decode asset ' + uuid + ':', err);
        blobUrls[uuid] = URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([], { type: entry.mime }));
      }
    }));

    const extResEl = document.querySelector('script[type="__bundler/ext_resources"]');
    const extResources = extResEl ? JSON.parse(extResEl.textContent) : [];
    const resourceMap = {};
    for (const entry of extResources) {
      if (blobUrls[entry.uuid]) resourceMap[entry.id] = blobUrls[entry.uuid];
    }

    setStatus('Rendering...');
    for (const uuid of uuids) template = template.split(uuid).join(blobUrls[uuid]);

    // Strip integrity + crossorigin — blob URLs from a file:// document inherit
    // a null origin, so crossorigin forces a CORS fetch that SRI then rejects.
    // The manifest bytes are ours; SRI protects against CDN compromise, not this.
    template = template.replace(/\s+integrity="[^"]*"/gi, '').replace(/\s+crossorigin="[^"]*"/gi, '');

    const resourceScript = '<script>window.__resources = ' +
      JSON.stringify(resourceMap).split('</' + 'script>').join('<\\/' + 'script>') +
      ';</' + 'script>';
    // Inject after <head> so the DOCTYPE stays first; prepending the script
    // would push the parser into quirks mode. DOMParser always emits a <head>
    // (synthesizing one if the source HTML omitted it) but may carry
    // attributes through, so match the full opening tag. slice() rather than
    // replace() keeps us clear of $-pattern substitution in resourceScript.
    const headOpen = template.match(/<head[^>]*>/i);
    if (headOpen) {
      const i = headOpen.index + headOpen[0].length;
      template = template.slice(0, i) + resourceScript + template.slice(i);
    }

    // Parse the template and swap the root element. Scripts inserted via
    // DOMParser/replaceWith are inert per spec — re-create each with
    // createElement so they execute, awaiting onload for src scripts to
    // preserve ordering (React before ReactDOM before Babel before text/babel).
    const doc = new DOMParser().parseFromString(template, 'text/html');
    document.documentElement.replaceWith(doc.documentElement);
    const dead = Array.from(document.scripts);
    for (const old of dead) {
      const s = document.createElement('script');
      for (const a of old.attributes) s.setAttribute(a.name, a.value);
      s.textContent = old.textContent;
      // text/babel scripts with a src: fetch and inline. transformScriptTags
      // does XHR against the src, but blob:null/ from a file:// origin is
      // silently dropped. Inlining makes it a plain inline babel script,
      // which transformScriptTags handles unconditionally.
      if ((s.type === 'text/babel' || s.type === 'text/jsx') && s.src) {
        const r = await fetch(s.src);
        s.textContent = await r.text();
        s.removeAttribute('src');
      }
      const p = s.src ? new Promise(function(r) { s.onload = s.onerror = r; }) : null;
      old.replaceWith(s);
      if (p) await p;
    }
    // Babel standalone auto-transforms type=text/babel on DOMContentLoaded,
    // which fired before we swapped the document. Trigger manually if present.
    if (window.Babel && typeof window.Babel.transformScriptTags === 'function') {
      window.Babel.transformScriptTags();
    }
  } catch (err) {
    setStatus('Error unpacking: ' + err.message);
    console.error('Bundle unpack error:', err);
  }
});

  </script>

url(\"7575f608-3318-4aa3-84ba-ff47f32defa9\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0301, U+0400-045F, U+0490-0491, U+04B0-04B1, U+2116;\n}\n/* vietnamese */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'Montserrat';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"57ea8daa-6879-4f16-9102-f5eca140d58e\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0102-0103, U+0110-0111, U+0128-0129, U+0168-0169, U+01A0-01A1, U+01AF-01B0, U+0300-0301, U+0303-0304, U+0308-0309, U+0323, U+0329, U+1EA0-1EF9, U+20AB;\n}\n/* latin-ext */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'Montserrat';\n U+02CE-02D7, U+02DD-02FF, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+1D00-1DBF, U+1E00-1E9F, U+1EF2-1EFF, U+2020, U+20A0-20AB, U+20AD-20C0, U+2113, U+2C60-2C7F, U+A720-A7FF;\n}\n/* latin */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'Montserrat';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"edb6cd9a-8d0b-49f0-b3f5-171f8aad2810\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0000-00FF, U+0131, U+0152-0153, U+02BB-02BC, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+2000-206F, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD;\n}\n<\u002Fstyle>\n\n<style>\n:root{\n  --cream:#f7f6f0; --cream-deep:#eeece1; --paper:#fff;\n  --ink:#2c352a; --ink-soft:#5d685a; --ink-faint:#98a18f;\n  --line:#e6e3d6; --line-strong:#d6d2c3;\n  --sage:#384d39; --sage-deep:#2b3c2c; --sage-tint:#e7ece3;\n  --rose:#aa2138; --rose-deep:#8c1a2e; --rose-tint:#f5e2e4; --gold:#b3934f;\n  --serif:\"Cabin\",system-ui,sans-serif;\n  --sans:\"Montserrat\",system-ui,sans-serif;\n  --mono:\"Archivo\",system-ui,sans-serif;\n  --shadow-sm:0 1px 3px rgba(58,52,44,.06);\n  --shadow-md:0 6px 22px rgba(58,52,44,.09);\n  --shadow-lg:0 22px 60px rgba(58,52,44,.16);\n}\n*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;}\nhtml{scroll-behavior:smooth;}\nbody{font-family:var(--sans);background:var(--cream);color:var(--ink);-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;line-height:1.6;}\nh1,h2,h3,h4{font-family:var(--serif);font-weight:600;line-height:1.08;letter-spacing:-.01em;}\n.mono{font-family:var(--mono);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.15em;font-weight:600;}\na{color:inherit;}\n.wrap{max-width:1080px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 28px;}\n.spark{color:var(--rose);}\n\n/* sticky bar */\n.bar{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:20;background:rgba(247,246,240,.9);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);}\n.bar .wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;padding:13px 28px;}\n.bar img{width:34px;height:34px;object-fit:contain;}\n.bar .name{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:18px;font-weight:600;}\n.bar .sub{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:8.5px;color:var(--ink-faint);margin-top:2px;}\n.bar .cta{margin-left:auto;}\n.btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--sans);\n  font-size:14.5px;font-weight:600;padding:13px 24px;border-radius:999px;text-decoration:none;transition:transform .15s,box-shadow .15s;}\n.btn:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);}\n.btn-solid{background:var(--sage-deep);color:var(--cream);box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);}\n.btn-solid:hover{box-shadow:var(--shadow-md);}\n.btn-cream{background:var(--cream);color:var(--sage-deep);box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.18);}\n.btn-ghost{background:transparent;color:var(--cream);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.32);}\n.bar .btn{padding:10px 20px;font-size:13.5px;}\n\n/* hero */\n.hero{background:var(--sage-deep);color:var(--cream);position:relative;overflow:hidden;}\n.hero .wrap{padding:78px 28px 84px;position:relative;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.3fr .7fr;gap:48px;align-items:center;}\n.hero .hcopy{min-width:0;}\n.hero .himg{min-width:0;}\n.hero .himg img{width:100%;height:auto;display:block;border-radius:20px;box-shadow:0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.28);}\n.hero .kick{color:var(--cream);opacity:.85;font-size:11px;margin-bottom:22px;}\n.hero h1{color:var(--cream);font-size:clamp(34px,4.4vw,58px);max-width:560px;margin-bottom:22px;}\n.hero h1 em{font-style:italic;color:#e9d6b8;}\n.hero p{font-size:clamp(16px,1.7vw,19px);color:rgba(247,246,240,.82);max-width:520px;margin-bottom:30px;}\n.hero .row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:14px;align-items:center;}\n.hero .note{font-size:13.5px;color:rgba(247,246,240,.7);}\n@media(max-width:820px){\n  .hero .wrap{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:38px;}\n  .hero .himg{max-width:460px;}\n}\n.tagstrip{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px 16px;margin-top:46px;font-family:var(--serif);font-style:italic;font-size:16px;color:rgba(247,246,240,.78);}\n.tagstrip .spark{font-style:normal;font-size:12px;}\n\n/* section scaffolding */\nsection{padding:84px 0;}\n.eyebrow{font-size:11px;color:var(--rose-deep);margin-bottom:14px;}\n.lead{font-size:clamp(26px,3.4vw,38px);max-width:680px;margin-bottom:18px;}\n.sub{font-size:17px;color:var(--ink-soft);max-width:600px;}\n.center{text-align:center;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;}\n\n/* reassurance band */\n.calm{background:var(--cream-deep);}\n.calm-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:22px;margin-top:46px;}\n.calm-card{background:var(--paper);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:18px;padding:30px 26px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);}\n.calm-card .ic{width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:13px;background:var(--sage-tint);color:var(--sage-deep);display:grid;place-items:center;margin-bottom:18px;}\n.calm-card h3{font-size:21px;margin-bottom:9px;}\n.calm-card p{font-size:14.5px;color:var(--ink-soft);}\n\n/* modules grid */\n.mods{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:14px;margin-top:46px;}\n.mod{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;background:var(--paper);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:15px;padding:18px 20px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);}\n.mod .ic{width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:11px;background:var(--sage-tint);color:var(--sage-deep);display:grid;place-items:center;flex-shrink:0;}\n.mod .n{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--ink-faint);margin-bottom:3px;}\n.mod h4{font-size:17px;}\n.mod .k{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--ink-soft);margin-top:2px;}\n\n/* feature split */\n.split{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:50px;align-items:center;}\n.feat-list{list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:20px;margin-top:24px;}\n.feat-list li{display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:flex-start;}\n.feat-list .ic{width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:9px;background:var(--rose-tint);color:var(--rose-deep);display:grid;place-items:center;flex-shrink:0;}\n.feat-list h4{font-size:17px;margin-bottom:3px;}\n.feat-list p{font-size:14px;color:var(--ink-soft);}\n.mock{background:var(--sage-deep);border-radius:22px;padding:30px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);position:relative;overflow:hidden;}\n.mock .chip{display:inline-block;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);background:rgba(255,255,255,.14);padding:5px 11px;border-radius:999px;margin-bottom:18px;}\n.mock h3{color:var(--cream);font-size:26px;margin-bottom:10px;}\n.mock p{color:rgba(247,246,240,.8);font-size:14px;margin-bottom:20px;}\n.mock .ck{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px;padding:11px 0;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);color:var(--cream);font-size:14px;}\n.mock .box{width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:6px;background:var(--cream);color:var(--sage-deep);display:grid;place-items:center;flex-shrink:0;}\n.mock .box.empty{background:transparent;border:1.6px solid rgba(255,255,255,.4);}\n\n/* pricing */\n.price{background:var(--sage-deep);color:var(--cream);}\n.price-card{background:var(--paper);color:var(--ink);border-radius:24px;padding:46px 42px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);max-width:560px;margin:40px auto 0;text-align:center;}\n.price-card .amt{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:64px;line-height:1;color:var(--sage-deep);margin:6px 0 4px;}\n.price-card .amt span{font-size:26px;vertical-align:super;}\n.price-card .free{display:inline-block;background:var(--rose-tint);color:var(--rose-deep);font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;padding:7px 14px;border-radius:999px;margin-bottom:26px;}\n.price-card ul{list-style:none;text-align:left;max-width:360px;margin:0 auto 30px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px;}\n.price-card li{display:flex;gap:11px;align-items:flex-start;font-size:15px;}\n.price-card li .ic{color:var(--sage);flex-shrink:0;margin-top:3px;}\n.price-card .btn-solid{width:100%;justify-content:center;padding:16px;font-size:16px;}\n.price-card .guarantee{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--ink-faint);margin-top:16px;}\n\n/* faq */\n.faq-item{border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);padding:22px 0;}\n.faq-item h4{font-size:18px;margin-bottom:8px;display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:flex-start;}\n.faq-item h4 .spark{margin-top:2px;}\n.faq-item p{font-size:15px;color:var(--ink-soft);padding-left:24px;}\n\n/* closing */\n.closing{background:var(--cream-deep);text-align:center;}\n.closing
